recommendations.title: Moonlight Mile
recommendations.overview: As he copes with the death of his fiancee along with her parents, a young man must figure out what he wants out of life.

recommendations.title: An Ordinary Man
recommendations.overview: A war criminal in hiding forms a relationship with his only connection to the outside world - his maid.

recommendations.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
recommendations.overview: Three wealthy children's parents are killed in a fire. When they are sent to a distant relative, they find out that he is plotting to kill them and seize their fortune.

recommendations.title: 10 Items or Less

recommendations.title: Casper
recommendations.overview: Casper is a kind young ghost who peacefully haunts a mansion in Maine. When specialist James Harvey arrives to communicate with Casper and his fellow spirits, he brings along his teenage daughter, Kat. Casper quickly falls in love with Kat, but their

recommendations.title: Mr. Nobody
recommendations.overview: Nemo Nobody leads an ordinary existence with his wife and 3 children; one day, he wakes up as a mortal centenarian in the year 2092.

recommendations.title: The Prophecy
recommendations.overview: The angel Gabriel comes to Earth to collect a soul which will end the stalemated war in Heaven. However, it is hidden inside of a Native American girl and only a former priest and a schoolteacher can stop him.

recommendations.title: Land of the Lost

recommendations.title: The African Queen
recommendations.overview: At the start of the First World War, in the middle of Africa’s nowhere, a gin soaked riverboat captain is persuaded by a strong-willed missionary to go down river and face-off a German warship.

recommendations.title: What Dreams May Come
